title: Grant Emergency Minting Authority to Core Team Multisig
description: Grant the core team multisig the ability to mint governance tokens during emergencies without a full governance vote. This would allow rapid response to critical situations but concentrates power in a small group. The authority would be limited to 1% of total supply per quarter.

simulationTx.description: AAVE.grantRole(MINTER_ROLE, multisig) from Aave Executor — may REVERT if no admin role
